fmt.description: Format the TypeScript files in this extension folder.

doc.description: Generate documentation for the TypeScript sources in this extension folder.

check.description: Type check a folder of TypeScript sources with deno check.

test.description: Run unit tests for a TypeScript extension with deno test --allow-read --allow-write.

swampfmt.description: Format extension before pushing for swamp.

swamppushdryrun.description: Dry-run of publishing a swamp extension.
